'''Wasith''' was a [[Supervisor (Corporate Sector Authority)|supervisor]] for the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. The commanding officer of the CSA on [[Brosi]], Wasith was responsible for the [[Zinsian]] processing plants. Wasith found trouble when dealing with the [[Brosin Underground]], a resistance group opposing to the CSA's methods.<ref name="AIR" />

Wasith tried to deal with the Underground first with the CSA [[Security Police/Legends|Security Police]], but they were ineffective due to their unfamiliarity with the local landscape. The Supervisor then tried hiring bounty hunters, but to no avail: One of the bounty hunters resigned alleging inadequate support of CSA officers.<ref name="AIR" />
